payment.note: Payment method requested: Zelle. Final gift fulfillment is up to Jen.

subtitle: A personalized birthday casino packed with tacos, plants, candles, sisterly love, and Dave's extremely limited audit powers.
bigline: Sarah gets 5 official chances to win laughs, love, and promised cash prizes from Jen.

welcome.title: Welcome, Sarah!
paragraphs: This is your official 40th Birthday Playable Greeting from Jen.
You get 5 official plays. Some prizes win promised cash from Jen. Some prizes win laughs. Every prize is powered by tacos, plants, candles, and birthday law.
welcome.overrideLine: Important rule: Dave may inspect the results, but his authority ends where Sarah's birthday begins.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Guaranteed minimum birthday love: unlimited. Guaranteed minimum Dave commentary: probably also unlimited.

rules: Play until the prize is revealed.
Cash prizes are promised gifts from Jen only.
Anyone who says Sarah has enough plants must leave the casino immediately.

finale.title: 🎉 Official 40th Birthday Result
finale.note: Official game: Sarah keeps the laughs and the best promised cash win. Final gift fulfillment is up to Jen.
finale.restartButton: 🔄 Play Again — Dave Demands a Recount

slots.marqueeStart: ✨ 40TH BIRTHDAY SLOT LUCK LOADING FOR SARAH ✨
rules: Press spin until the prize is revealed.
Cash prizes are promised gifts from Jen only.
Anyone who says Sarah has enough plants must leave immediately.
slots.finaleNote: Official game: best promised cash win from the birthday spins counts. Funny prizes count as family-approved birthday glory.

prizes.title: 🎂 40th Birthday Starter Win
prizes.msg: Sarah wins $5 because turning 40 deserves an opening cash celebration before Dave can locate a calculator.

prizes.title: 👑 Birthday Queen Bonus
prizes.msg: Sarah wins $10 because the Birthday Queen's ruling is final, fabulous, and not subject to Dave's committee review.

prizes.title: 😂 Laughter Jackpot
prizes.msg: No cash this time, but Sarah wins one official family laugh and the right to retell the story with extra dramatic details.

prizes.title: 🎉 Forty and Fantastic Clause
prizes.msg: Sarah is officially declared forty and fantastic. This clause cannot be appealed, amended, or questioned by anyone holding a receipt.

prizes.title: 💸 Sister-Sponsored Cash Drop
prizes.msg: Sarah wins $15 from Jen's birthday fund. Playable Greetings pays in confetti only; Jen handles the real-world celebration.

prizes.title: 🌮 Taco Emergency Fund
prizes.msg: Sarah wins $5 toward tacos, because tacos are not a meal choice. They are a 40th birthday strategy.

prizes.title: 🪴 One More Plant Permit
prizes.msg: Sarah officially wins permission to say,
even if several plants are already forming a quiet indoor government.

prizes.title: 🕯️ Candle Acquisition Approval
prizes.msg: Sarah wins the right to buy another candle because this one has a completely different scent, mood, season, vibe, and emotional assignment.

prizes.title: 🎥 Slot Stream Shout-Out
prizes.msg: Internet Skater Brandon interrupts the broadcast to wish Sarah a Happy 40th Birthday and reminds everyone:

prizes.title: 🧾 Dave Audit Override
prizes.msg: Sarah wins $10. Dave opened an investigation, reviewed the taco-plant-candle evidence, and was immediately overruled by birthday law.

prizes.title: 📋 Dave's Objection Form
prizes.msg: Dave may file one official objection. Processing time is 3 to 5 business birthdays, and Sarah may buy another plant while waiting.

prizes.title: ❤️ Real Jackpot
prizes.msg: Sarah wins $5, but the real jackpot is this: Jen, Dave, Emma, Jack, and everyone who loves her are grateful for her, laughing with her, and celebrating the gift she is.
